CHECK: Canonical entrypoint run_switching_canonical.m uses createRunContext and writes only under its run_dir
DETAIL: No shared mutable repo state; raw input from filesystem paths parsed from Switching ver12 Switching_main.m.

CHECK: Many Switching/analysis scripts read/write repo-root tables/ and reports/
DETAIL: Breaks strict run_dir-only isolation for aggregate artifacts; cross-run and cross-experiment paths embedded.

CHECK: Hardcoded absolute paths (e.g. C:/Dev/matlab-functions/tables) in multiple Switching scripts
DETAIL: Path-dependent and machine-bound; not portable; couples analysis to developer filesystem.

CHECK: Prior-run dependencies (fixed run_2026_* ids or registry-driven selection)
DETAIL: run_parameter_robustness_switching_canonical.m and mapping scripts bind to specific historical runs.

CHECK: resolve_results_input_dir chains latest CANONICAL run with required subfolder
DETAIL: Implicit ordering on run_* sort; fails if PARTIAL run encountered; depends on prior analysis outputs under results/.

CHECK: Global MATLAB path state (restoredefaultpath addpath legacy Switching ver12)
DETAIL: Isolated per invocation; deterministic given same repo layout; genpath usage in switching_alignment_audit.m is broader than minimal addpath in canonical entrypoint.
